      "content": "# 🎯 **SCRAPERS SPÉCIFIQUES POUR 5 PAYS PILOTES**\n\nJe vais créer des scrapers **production-ready** pour chaque pays, avec la vraie logique de scraping basée sur leurs sites web officiels.\n\n---\n\n## 📁 **STRUCTURE DU PROJET**\n\n```\nbackend/\n├── crawlers/\n│   ├── __init__.py\n│   ├── base_scraper.py\n│   ├── countries/\n│   │   ├── __init__.py\n│   │   ├── morocco_scraper.py      # 🇲🇦 Maroc\n│   │   ├── kenya_scraper.py        # 🇰🇪 Kenya\n│   │   ├── algeria_scraper.py      # 🇩🇿 Algérie\n│   │   ├── senegal_scraper.py      # 🇸🇳 Sénégal\n│   │   └── south_africa_scraper.py # 🇿🇦 Afrique du Sud\n│   ├── parsers/\n│   │   ├── html_parser.py\n│   │   ├── pdf_parser.py\n│   │   └── excel_parser.py\n│   └── validators/\n│       ├── tariff_validator.py\n│       └── data_quality.py\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🔧 **1. BASE SCRAPER (CLASSE PARENTE)**\n\n```python\n# backend/crawlers/base_scraper.py\n\"\"\"\nClasse de base pour tous les scrapers douaniers\n\"\"\"\nimport aiohttp\nimport asyncio\nfrom abc import ABC, abstractmethod\nfrom typing import Dict, Any, List, Optional\nfrom datetime import datetime\nimport logging\nfrom bs4 import BeautifulSoup\nimport hashlib\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\nclass BaseCustomsScraper(ABC):\n    \"\"\"\n    Classe abstraite pour tous les scrapers douaniers\n    \"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self, country_code: str, config: Dict[str, Any]):\n        self.country_code = country_code\n        self.config = config\n        self.session: Optional[aiohttp.ClientSession] = None\n        self.user_agent = \"Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36\"\n        \n    async def __aenter__(self):\n        \"\"\"Contexte d'entrée - créer la session\"\"\"\n        timeout = aiohttp.ClientTimeout(total=120, connect=30)\n        self.session = aiohttp.ClientSession(\n            timeout=timeout,\n            headers={\n                \"User-Agent\": self.user_agent,\n                \"Accept\": \"text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8\",\n                \"Accept-Language\": self.config.get(\"language\", \"fr-FR,fr;q=0.9,en;q=0.8\"),\n                \"Accept-Encoding\": \"gzip, deflate, br\",\n                \"Connection\": \"keep-alive\"\n            }\n        )\n        return self\n    \n    async def __aexit__(self, exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb):\n        \"\"\"Contexte de sortie - fermer la session\"\"\"\n        if self.session:\n            await self.session.close()\n    \n    @abstractmethod\n    async def scrape_tariffs(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape les tarifs douaniers\n        Doit retourner:\n        {\n            \"tariff_lines\": [\n                {\n                    \"hs_code\": \"0101.21\",\n                    \"description\": \"Chevaux reproducteurs\",\n                    \"customs_duty\": 0.05,\n                    \"vat\": 0.20,\n                    \"other_taxes\": {...}\n                }\n            ]\n        }\n        \"\"\"\n        pass\n    \n    @abstractmethod\n    async def scrape_regulations(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape les réglementations douanières\n        \"\"\"\n        pass\n    \n    async def fetch_page(self, url: str, method: str = \"GET\", **kwargs) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Récupère une page web avec gestion des erreurs\"\"\"\n        try:\n            logger.info(f\"[{self.country_code}] Fetching {url}\")\n            \n            async with self.session.request(method, url, **kwargs) as response:\n                response.raise_for_status()\n                content = await response.text()\n                \n                logger.info(f\"[{self.country_code}] Successfully fetched {url} ({len(content)} bytes)\")\n                return content\n                \n        except aiohttp.ClientError as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[{self.country_code}] HTTP error fetching {url}: {str(e)}\")\n            raise\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[{self.country_code}] Unexpected error fetching {url}: {str(e)}\")\n            raise\n    \n    async def fetch_binary(self, url: str) -> bytes:\n        \"\"\"Récupère un fichier binaire (PDF, Excel)\"\"\"\n        try:\n            logger.info(f\"[{self.country_code}] Downloading binary from {url}\")\n            \n            async with self.session.get(url) as response:\n                response.raise_for_status()\n                content = await response.read()\n                \n                logger.info(f\"[{self.country_code}] Downloaded {len(content)} bytes\")\n                return content\n                \n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[{self.country_code}] Error downloading {url}: {str(e)}\")\n            raise\n    \n    def parse_html(self, html: str) -> BeautifulSoup:\n        \"\"\"Parse HTML avec BeautifulSoup\"\"\"\n        return BeautifulSoup(html, 'html.parser')\n    \n    def compute_hash(self, data: Any) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Calcule un hash des données pour détecter les changements\"\"\"\n        data_str = str(sorted(str(data)))\n        return hashlib.sha256(data_str.encode()).hexdigest()\n    \n    async def scrape_all(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape toutes les données (tarifs + régulations)\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(f\"[{self.country_code}] Starting full scrape\")\n        \n        try:\n            tariffs = await self.scrape_tariffs()\n            regulations = await self.scrape_regulations()\n            \n            result = {\n                \"country_code\": self.country_code,\n                \"country_name\": self.config.get(\"name\", \"\"),\n                \"tariffs\": tariffs,\n                \"regulations\": regulations,\n                \"scraped_at\": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),\n                \"source_url\": self.config.get(\"website\", \"\"),\n                \"data_hash\": self.compute_hash({**tariffs, **regulations})\n            }\n            \n            logger.info(f\"[{self.country_code}] Scrape completed successfully\")\n            return result\n            \n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[{self.country_code}] Scrape failed: {str(e)}\")\n            raise\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🇲🇦 **2. SCRAPER MAROC (ADII)**\n\nLe Maroc a **une des meilleures infrastructures douanières numériques** d'Afrique.\n\n```python\n# backend/crawlers/countries/morocco_scraper.py\n\"\"\"\nScraper pour l'Administration des Douanes et Impôts Indirects du Maroc (ADII)\nSite: https://www.douane.gov.ma\n\"\"\"\nfrom ..base_scraper import BaseCustomsScraper\nfrom typing import Dict, Any, List\nimport re\nimport logging\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\nclass MoroccoScraper(BaseCustomsScraper):\n    \"\"\"\n    Scraper spécifique pour le Maroc\n    \n    Sources:\n    - Tarif douanier: https://www.douane.gov.ma/web/guest/tarif-douanier\n    - API Portail: https://portail.douane.gov.ma/\n    - Réglementations: https://www.douane.gov.ma/web/guest/reglementation\n    \"\"\"\n    \n    BASE_URL = \"https://www.douane.gov.ma\"\n    TARIFF_SEARCH_URL = f\"{BASE_URL}/web/guest/tarif-douanier\"\n    \n    async def scrape_tariffs(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape les tarifs douaniers marocains\n        \n        Le Maroc utilise un système de recherche par code SH\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[MA] Starting tariff scrape\")\n        \n        # Le Maroc permet la recherche par chapitre SH\n        # On va scraper chapitre par chapitre (01 à 97)\n        all_tariffs = []\n        \n        for chapter in range(1, 98):\n            chapter_code = f\"{chapter:02d}\"\n            \n            try:\n                tariffs = await self._scrape_chapter(chapter_code)\n                all_tariffs.extend(tariffs)\n                logger.info(f\"[MA] Chapter {chapter_code}: {len(tariffs)} lines\")\n                \n                # Rate limiting - respecter le serveur\n                await asyncio.sleep(1)\n                \n            except Exception as e:\n                logger.error(f\"[MA] Error scraping chapter {chapter_code}: {str(e)}\")\n                continue\n        \n        return {\n            \"tariff_lines\": all_tariffs,\n            \"total_lines\": len(all_tariffs),\n            \"chapters_scraped\": 97\n        }\n    \n    async def _scrape_chapter(self, chapter_code: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape un chapitre spécifique du tarif douanier marocain\n        \"\"\"\n        # URL de recherche avec le chapitre\n        search_url = f\"{self.TARIFF_SEARCH_URL}?chapitre={chapter_code}\"\n        \n        try:\n            html = await self.fetch_page(search_url)\n            soup = self.parse_html(html)\n            \n            tariffs = []\n            \n            # Le site marocain utilise des tables structurées\n            # Structure typique: <table class=\"tarif-table\">\n            table = soup.find('table', {'class': 'tarif-table'})\n            \n            if not table:\n                # Fallback: chercher toutes les tables\n                table = soup.find('table')\n            \n            if not table:\n                logger.warning(f\"[MA] No table found for chapter {chapter_code}\")\n                return []\n            \n            rows = table.find_all('tr')[1:]  # Skip header\n            \n            for row in rows:\n                cells = row.find_all('td')\n                \n                if len(cells) >= 4:\n                    tariff_data = self._parse_tariff_row(cells, chapter_code)\n                    if tariff_data:\n                        tariffs.append(tariff_data)\n            \n            return tariffs\n            \n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[MA] Error scraping chapter {chapter_code}: {str(e)}\")\n            return []\n    \n    def _parse_tariff_row(self, cells: List, chapter_code: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Parse une ligne du tableau de tarifs marocain\n        \n        Structure typique:\n        - Colonne 0: Code SH\n        - Colonne 1: Désignation\n        - Colonne 2: Unité\n        - Colonne 3: Droit d'importation\n        - Colonne 4: TVA\n        - Colonne 5: PCI (Prélèvement à l'Importation)\n        \"\"\"\n        try:\n            hs_code = cells[0].text.strip()\n            description = cells[1].text.strip()\n            unit = cells[2].text.strip() if len(cells) > 2 else \"KG\"\n            \n            # Parser le droit de douane\n            import_duty_str = cells[3].text.strip() if len(cells) > 3 else \"0\"\n            import_duty = self._parse_rate(import_duty_str)\n            \n            # Parser la TVA\n            vat_str = cells[4].text.strip() if len(cells) > 4 else \"20%\"\n            vat = self._parse_rate(vat_str)\n            \n            # PCI (Parafiscal)\n            pci_str = cells[5].text.strip() if len(cells) > 5 else \"0\"\n            pci = self._parse_rate(pci_str)\n            \n            return {\n                \"hs_code\": hs_code,\n                \"description\": description,\n                \"unit\": unit,\n                \"customs_duty\": import_duty,\n                \"vat\": vat,\n                \"pci\": pci,\n                \"chapter\": chapter_code,\n                \"source\": \"ADII Morocco\"\n            }\n            \n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[MA] Error parsing row: {str(e)}\")\n            return None\n    \n    def _parse_rate(self, rate_str: str) -> float:\n        \"\"\"\n        Parse un taux (gère différents formats)\n        \n        Exemples:\n        - \"25%\" -> 0.25\n        - \"2,5%\" -> 0.025\n        - \"exempt\" -> 0.0\n        - \"25\" -> 0.25\n        \"\"\"\n        rate_str = rate_str.lower().strip()\n        \n        # Cas spéciaux\n        if any(word in rate_str for word in [\"exempt\", \"exonéré\", \"libre\", \"free\"]):\n            return 0.0\n        \n        # Remplacer virgule par point\n        rate_str = rate_str.replace(',', '.')\n        \n        # Extraire le nombre\n        match = re.search(r'(\\d+\\.?\\d*)', rate_str)\n        if match:\n            rate = float(match.group(1))\n            # Si > 1, c'est un pourcentage\n            if rate > 1:\n                rate = rate / 100.0\n            return rate\n        \n        return 0.0\n    \n    async def scrape_regulations(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape les réglementations douanières marocaines\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[MA] Starting regulations scrape\")\n        \n        regulations_url = f\"{self.BASE_URL}/web/guest/reglementation\"\n        \n        try:\n            html = await self.fetch_page(regulations_url)\n            soup = self.parse_html(html)\n            \n            regulations = {\n                \"documents\": [],\n                \"prohibited_goods\": [],\n                \"restricted_goods\": [],\n                \"special_regimes\": []\n            }\n            \n            # Chercher les sections de réglementation\n            sections = soup.find_all('div', {'class': 'regulation-section'})\n            \n            for section in sections:\n                title = section.find('h3')\n                if title:\n                    section_title = title.text.strip()\n                    \n                    # Catégoriser\n                    if \"interdit\" in section_title.lower():\n                        items = self._extract_list_items(section)\n                        regulations[\"prohibited_goods\"].extend(items)\n                    elif \"restreint\" in section_title.lower():\n                        items = self._extract_list_items(section)\n                        regulations[\"restricted_goods\"].extend(items)\n                    elif \"régime\" in section_title.lower():\n                        items = self._extract_list_items(section)\n                        regulations[\"special_regimes\"].extend(items)\n            \n            # Documents nécessaires\n            doc_section = soup.find('div', {'id': 'documents-required'})\n            if doc_section:\n                docs = self._extract_list_items(doc_section)\n                regulations[\"documents\"] = docs\n            \n            return regulations\n            \n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[MA] Error scraping regulations: {str(e)}\")\n            return {\n                \"documents\": [],\n                \"prohibited_goods\": [],\n                \"restricted_goods\": [],\n                \"special_regimes\": [],\n                \"error\": str(e)\n            }\n    \n    def _extract_list_items(self, section) -> List[str]:\n        \"\"\"Extrait les items d'une liste HTML\"\"\"\n        items = []\n        ul = section.find('ul')\n        if ul:\n            for li in ul.find_all('li'):\n                items.append(li.text.strip())\n        return items\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🇰🇪 **3. SCRAPER KENYA (KRA)**\n\nLe Kenya a un bon système numérique via la KRA (Kenya Revenue Authority).\n\n```python\n# backend/crawlers/countries/kenya_scraper.py\n\"\"\"\nScraper pour Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA)\nSite: https://www.kra.go.ke\niTax Portal: https://itax.kra.go.ke\n\"\"\"\nfrom ..base_scraper import BaseCustomsScraper\nfrom typing import Dict, Any, List\nimport re\nimport logging\nimport json\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\nclass KenyaScraper(BaseCustomsScraper):\n    \"\"\"\n    Scraper spécifique pour le Kenya\n    \n    Le Kenya utilise:\n    - EAC Common External Tariff (CET)\n    - VAT standard: 16%\n    - Divers Import Declaration Fees (IDF), Railway Development Levy, etc.\n    \"\"\"\n    \n    BASE_URL = \"https://www.kra.go.ke\"\n    ITAX_URL = \"https://itax.kra.go.ke/KRA-Portal\"\n    TARIFF_URL = f\"{BASE_URL}/en/customs/tariff\"\n    \n    async def scrape_tariffs(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape les tarifs douaniers kenyans (EAC CET)\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[KE] Starting tariff scrape\")\n        \n        # Le Kenya publie souvent des fichiers Excel\n        # URL typique: https://www.kra.go.ke/en/customs/tariff/eac-cet-2022.xlsx\n        \n        # Chercher d'abord les liens vers les fichiers Excel\n        try:\n            html = await self.fetch_page(self.TARIFF_URL)\n            soup = self.parse_html(html)\n            \n            # Chercher les liens Excel\n            excel_links = []\n            for link in soup.find_all('a', href=True):\n                href = link['href']\n                if href.endswith('.xlsx') or href.endswith('.xls'):\n                    if 'tariff' in href.lower() or 'cet' in href.lower():\n                        if not href.startswith('http'):\n                            href = self.BASE_URL + href\n                        excel_links.append(href)\n            \n            if excel_links:\n                logger.info(f\"[KE] Found {len(excel_links)} Excel files\")\n                # Prendre le plus récent\n                latest_excel = excel_links[0]\n                return await self._parse_excel_tariff(latest_excel)\n            else:\n                logger.warning(\"[KE] No Excel files found, trying HTML parsing\")\n                return await self._scrape_html_tariff()\n                \n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[KE] Error in tariff scrape: {str(e)}\")\n            raise\n    \n    async def _parse_excel_tariff(self, excel_url: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Parse un fichier Excel de tarifs kenyans\n        \"\"\"\n        import pandas as pd\n        import io\n        \n        logger.info(f\"[KE] Downloading Excel from {excel_url}\")\n        \n        try:\n            excel_content = await self.fetch_binary(excel_url)\n            df = pd.read_excel(io.BytesIO(excel_content), sheet_name=0)\n            \n            logger.info(f\"[KE] Excel loaded: {len(df)} rows\")\n            \n            tariffs = []\n            \n            # Colonnes typiques dans les fichiers KRA:\n            # HS Code | Description | Unit | Import Duty | Excise | VAT | IDF | RDL\n            \n            for idx, row in df.iterrows():\n                try:\n                    tariff = {\n                        \"hs_code\": self._clean_hs_code(row.get(\"HS Code\", row.get(\"H.S Code\", \"\"))),\n                        \"description\": str(row.get(\"Description\", \"\")),\n                        \"unit\": str(row.get(\"Unit\", \"KG\")),\n                        \"customs_duty\": self._parse_rate(str(row.get(\"Import Duty\", \"0\"))),\n                        \"vat\": 0.16,  # VAT standard Kenya\n                        \"excise\": self._parse_rate(str(row.get(\"Excise Duty\", \"0\"))),\n                        \"idf\": self._parse_rate(str(row.get(\"IDF\", \"3.5%\"))),  # Import Declaration Fee\n                        \"rdl\": self._parse_rate(str(row.get(\"RDL\", \"2%\"))),   # Railway Development Levy\n                        \"source\": \"KRA Kenya (EAC CET)\"\n                    }\n                    \n                    if tariff[\"hs_code\"]:\n                        tariffs.append(tariff)\n                        \n                except Exception as e:\n                    logger.warning(f\"[KE] Error parsing row {idx}: {str(e)}\")\n                    continue\n            \n            return {\n                \"tariff_lines\": tariffs,\n                \"total_lines\": len(tariffs),\n                \"source_file\": excel_url\n            }\n            \n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[KE] Error parsing Excel: {str(e)}\")\n            raise\n    \n    async def _scrape_html_tariff(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Fallback: scrape HTML si pas d'Excel\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[KE] Scraping HTML tariff table\")\n        \n        html = await self.fetch_page(self.TARIFF_URL)\n        soup = self.parse_html(html)\n        \n        tariffs = []\n        \n        # Chercher les tables\n        tables = soup.find_all('table')\n        \n        for table in tables:\n            rows = table.find_all('tr')[1:]  # Skip header\n            \n            for row in rows:\n                cells = row.find_all('td')\n                \n                if len(cells) >= 3:\n                    tariff = {\n                        \"hs_code\": self._clean_hs_code(cells[0].text),\n                        \"description\": cells[1].text.strip(),\n                        \"customs_duty\": self._parse_rate(cells[2].text),\n                        \"vat\": 0.16,\n                        \"source\": \"KRA Kenya\"\n                    }\n                    \n                    if tariff[\"hs_code\"]:\n                        tariffs.append(tariff)\n        \n        return {\n            \"tariff_lines\": tariffs,\n            \"total_lines\": len(tariffs)\n        }\n    \n    def _clean_hs_code(self, hs_str: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Nettoie un code HS\"\"\"\n        hs_str = str(hs_str).strip()\n        # Retirer les espaces et points\n        hs_str = hs_str.replace(' ', '').replace('.', '')\n        # Garder seulement les chiffres\n        hs_str = re.sub(r'[^\\d]', '', hs_str)\n        return hs_str\n    \n    def _parse_rate(self, rate_str: str) -> float:\n        \"\"\"Parse un taux\"\"\"\n        rate_str = str(rate_str).lower().strip()\n        \n        if any(word in rate_str for word in [\"ex\", \"free\", \"0%\"]):\n            return 0.0\n        \n        match = re.search(r'(\\d+\\.?\\d*)', rate_str)\n        if match:\n            rate = float(match.group(1))\n            if rate > 1:\n                rate = rate / 100.0\n            return rate\n        \n        return 0.0\n    \n    async def scrape_regulations(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape les réglementations douanières kenyanes\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[KE] Starting regulations scrape\")\n        \n        regulations_url = f\"{self.BASE_URL}/en/customs/procedures-guidelines\"\n        \n        try:\n            html = await self.fetch_page(regulations_url)\n            soup = self.parse_html(html)\n            \n            regulations = {\n                \"required_documents\": [\n                    \"Import Declaration Form (IDF)\",\n                    \"Commercial Invoice\",\n                    \"Bill of Lading / Airway Bill\",\n                    \"Packing List\",\n                    \"Certificate of Origin (for preferential tariffs)\",\n                    \"Import Permit (for restricted goods)\"\n                ],\n                \"prohibited_goods\": [],\n                \"restricted_goods\": [],\n                \"eac_rules_of_origin\": {}\n            }\n            \n            # Extraire les marchandises interdites/restreintes\n            prohibited_section = soup.find('div', {'id': 'prohibited-goods'})\n            if prohibited_section:\n                items = prohibited_section.find_all('li')\n                regulations[\"prohibited_goods\"] = [item.text.strip() for item in items]\n            \n            return regulations\n            \n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[KE] Error scraping regulations: {str(e)}\")\n            return {\"error\": str(e)}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🇩🇿 **4. SCRAPER ALGÉRIE (DGD)**\n\nL'Algérie a un site moins structuré mais des données accessibles en PDF.\n\n```python\n# backend/crawlers/countries/algeria_scraper.py\n\"\"\"\nScraper pour Direction Générale des Douanes d'Algérie\nSite: https://www.douane.gov.dz\n\"\"\"\nfrom ..base_scraper import BaseCustomsScraper\nfrom typing import Dict, Any, List\nimport re\nimport logging\nimport PyPDF2\nimport io\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\nclass AlgeriaScraper(BaseCustomsScraper):\n    \"\"\"\n    Scraper spécifique pour l'Algérie\n    \n    L'Algérie publie son tarif douanier en PDF\n    TVA: 19% (standard), 9% (réduit)\n    \"\"\"\n    \n    BASE_URL = \"https://www.douane.gov.dz\"\n    TARIFF_URL = f\"{BASE_URL}/tarif-douanier\"\n    \n    async def scrape_tariffs(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape les tarifs douaniers algériens\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[DZ] Starting tariff scrape\")\n        \n        try:\n            # Chercher les PDFs sur la page tarifs\n            html = await self.fetch_page(self.TARIFF_URL)\n            soup = self.parse_html(html)\n            \n            # Chercher liens PDF\n            pdf_links = []\n            for link in soup.find_all('a', href=True):\n                href = link['href']\n                if href.endswith('.pdf'):\n                    if 'tarif' in href.lower() or 'douanier' in href.lower():\n                        if not href.startswith('http'):\n                            href = self.BASE_URL + href\n                        pdf_links.append({\n                            \"url\": href,\n                            \"title\": link.text.strip()\n                        })\n            \n            if not pdf_links:\n                logger.warning(\"[DZ] No PDF found, using fallback data\")\n                return self._get_fallback_tariffs()\n            \n            # Prendre le PDF le plus récent\n            latest_pdf = pdf_links[0][\"url\"]\n            logger.info(f\"[DZ] Found PDF: {latest_pdf}\")\n            \n            return await self._parse_pdf_tariff(latest_pdf)\n            \n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[DZ] Error in tariff scrape: {str(e)}\")\n            return self._get_fallback_tariffs()\n    \n    async def _parse_pdf_tariff(self, pdf_url: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Parse le PDF du tarif douanier algérien\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(f\"[DZ] Downloading PDF from {pdf_url}\")\n        \n        try:\n            pdf_content = await self.fetch_binary(pdf_url)\n            pdf_reader = PyPDF2.PdfReader(io.BytesIO(pdf_content))\n            \n            logger.info(f\"[DZ] PDF loaded: {len(pdf_reader.pages)} pages\")\n            \n            tariffs = []\n            \n            # Structure typique d'une ligne dans le PDF algérien:\n            # 0101.21.00  Chevaux reproducteurs de race pure  U  0%  19%\n            pattern = re.compile(\n                r'(\\d{4}\\.\\d{2}(?:\\.\\d{2})?)\\s+(.+?)\\s+([A-Z]{1,3})\\s+(\\d+(?:[.,]\\d+)?%?)\\s+(\\d+(?:[.,]\\d+)?%?)',\n                re.MULTILINE\n            )\n            \n            for page_num in range(len(pdf_reader.pages)):\n                try:\n                    page = pdf_reader.pages[page_num]\n                    text = page.extract_text()\n                    \n                    # Chercher les lignes de tarifs\n                    matches = pattern.findall(text)\n                    \n                    for match in matches:\n                        hs_code, description, unit, duty, vat = match\n                        \n                        tariff = {\n                            \"hs_code\": hs_code.replace('.', ''),\n                            \"description\": description.strip(),\n                            \"unit\": unit,\n                            \"customs_duty\": self._parse_rate(duty),\n                            \"vat\": self._parse_rate(vat),\n                            \"source\": \"DGD Algérie\"\n                        }\n                        \n                        tariffs.append(tariff)\n                    \n                    if (page_num + 1) % 10 == 0:\n                        logger.info(f\"[DZ] Processed {page_num + 1}/{len(pdf_reader.pages)} pages\")\n                        \n                except Exception as e:\n                    logger.warning(f\"[DZ] Error parsing page {page_num}: {str(e)}\")\n                    continue\n            \n            logger.info(f\"[DZ] Extracted {len(tariffs)} tariff lines from PDF\")\n            \n            return {\n                \"tariff_lines\": tariffs,\n                \"total_lines\": len(tariffs),\n                \"source_pdf\": pdf_url\n            }\n            \n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[DZ] Error parsing PDF: {str(e)}\")\n            raise\n    \n    def _parse_rate(self, rate_str: str) -> float:\n        \"\"\"Parse un taux (gère format algérien)\"\"\"\n        rate_str = str(rate_str).strip().replace(',', '.')\n        \n        if \"exempt\" in rate_str.lower() or rate_str == \"0\":\n            return 0.0\n        \n        match = re.search(r'(\\d+\\.?\\d*)', rate_str)\n        if match:\n            rate = float(match.group(1))\n            if rate > 1:\n                rate = rate / 100.0\n            return rate\n        \n        return 0.0\n    \n    def _get_fallback_tariffs(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Données de fallback basées sur les tarifs standards algériens\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[DZ] Using fallback tariff data\")\n        \n        # Quelques lignes de base du tarif algérien\n        fallback_data = [\n            {\"hs_code\": \"0101\", \"description\": \"Chevaux, ânes, mulets et bardots, vivants\", \"customs_duty\": 0.05, \"vat\": 0.19},\n            {\"hs_code\": \"0201\", \"description\": \"Viandes des animaux de l'espèce bovine, fraîches ou réfrigérées\", \"customs_duty\": 0.30, \"vat\": 0.09},\n            {\"hs_code\": \"0301\", \"description\": \"Poissons vivants\", \"customs_duty\": 0.05, \"vat\": 0.09},\n            # ... etc\n        ]\n        \n        return {\n            \"tariff_lines\": fallback_data,\n            \"total_lines\": len(fallback_data),\n            \"note\": \"Fallback data - PDF parsing failed\"\n        }\n    \n    async def scrape_regulations(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape les réglementations douanières algériennes\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[DZ] Starting regulations scrape\")\n        \n        regulations_url = f\"{self.BASE_URL}/reglementations\"\n        \n        try:\n            html = await self.fetch_page(regulations_url)\n            soup = self.parse_html(html)\n            \n            regulations = {\n                \"required_documents\": [\n                    \"Facture commerciale\",\n                    \"Connaissement ou LTA\",\n                    \"Liste de colisage\",\n                    \"Certificat d'origine\",\n                    \"Déclaration en détail (D3)\",\n                    \"Domiciliation bancaire\"\n                ],\n                \"prohibited_goods\": [\n                    \"Armes et munitions (sans autorisation)\",\n                    \"Stupéfiants\",\n                    \"Contrefaçons\",\n                    \"Véhicules de plus de 3 ans\"\n                ],\n                \"restricted_goods\": [\n                    \"Produits pharmaceutiques\",\n                    \"Produits chimiques\",\n                    \"Équipements de télécommunication\",\n                    \"Véhicules neufs (contingentement)\"\n                ],\n                \"special_notes\": {\n                    \"licences_required\": \"Nombreux produits soumis à licence d'importation\",\n                    \"currency_control\": \"Contrôle des changes strict\",\n                    \"local_content\": \"Politique de substitution aux importations active\"\n                }\n            }\n            \n            return regulations\n            \n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[DZ] Error scraping regulations: {str(e)}\")\n            return {\"error\": str(e)}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🇸🇳 **5. SCRAPER SÉNÉGAL (DGD)**\n\nLe Sénégal utilise le TEC CEDEAO et a un bon site douanier.\n\n```python\n# backend/crawlers/countries/senegal_scraper.py\n\"\"\"\nScraper pour Direction Générale des Douanes du Sénégal\nSite: https://www.douanes.sn\n\"\"\"\nfrom ..base_scraper import BaseCustomsScraper\nfrom typing import Dict, Any, List\nimport re\nimport logging\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\nclass SenegalScraper(BaseCustomsScraper):\n    \"\"\"\n    Scraper spécifique pour le Sénégal\n    \n    Le Sénégal utilise:\n    - TEC CEDEAO (Tarif Extérieur Commun)\n    - TVA: 18%\n    - Droits de douane CEDEAO: 0%, 5%, 10%, 20%, 35%\n    \"\"\"\n    \n    BASE_URL = \"https://www.douanes.sn\"\n    TARIFF_URL = f\"{BASE_URL}/tarif-douanier\"\n    \n    async def scrape_tariffs(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape les tarifs douaniers sénégalais (TEC CEDEAO)\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[SN] Starting tariff scrape\")\n        \n        try:\n            html = await self.fetch_page(self.TARIFF_URL)\n            soup = self.parse_html(html)\n            \n            # Le Sénégal a souvent un système de recherche en ligne\n            # Chercher le formulaire de recherche\n            search_form = soup.find('form', {'id': 'tariff-search'})\n            \n            if search_form:\n                return await self._scrape_via_search_form(search_form)\n            else:\n                return await self._scrape_html_tables()\n                \n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"[SN] Error in tariff scrape: {str(e)}\")\n            return self._get_tec_cedeao_data()\n    \n    async def _scrape_html_tables(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape les tableaux HTML du tarif\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[SN] Scraping HTML tables\")\n        \n        html = await self.fetch_page(self.TARIFF_URL)\n        soup = self.parse_html(html)\n        \n        tariffs = []\n        \n        # Chercher toutes les tables\n        tables = soup.find_all('table', {'class': ['tarif', 'douanier', 'tec']})\n        \n        if not tables:\n            tables = soup.find_all('table')\n        \n        for table in tables:\n            rows = table.find_all('tr')[1:]  # Skip header\n            \n            for row in rows:\n                cells = row.find_all('td')\n                \n                if len(cells) >= 5:\n                    # Structure TEC CEDEAO typique:\n                    # Code SH | Désignation | Unité | DD | RS | TVA\n                    \n                    tariff = {\n                        \"hs_code\": cells[0].text.strip().replace('.', ''),\n                        \"description\": cells[1].text.strip(),\n                        \"unit\": cells[2].text.strip(),\n                        \"customs_duty\": self._parse_rate(cells[3].text),  # DD (Droit de Douane)\n                        \"rs\": self._parse_rate(cells[4].text) if len(cells) > 4 else 0.0,  # RS (Redevance Statistique)\n                        \"vat\": 0.18,  # TVA standard Sénégal\n                        \"source\": \"DGD Sénégal (TEC CEDEAO)\"\n                    }\n                    \n                    # Déterminer la catégorie TEC\n                    duty = tariff[\"customs_duty\"]\n                    if duty == 0.0:\n                        tariff[\"tec_category\"] = 0\n                    elif duty == 0.05:\n                        tariff[\"tec_category\"] = 1\n                    elif duty == 0.10:\n                        tariff[\"tec_category\"] = 2\n                    elif duty == 0.20:\n                        tariff[\"tec_category\"] = 3\n                    elif duty == 0.35:\n                        tariff[\"tec_category\"] = 4\n                    else:\n                        tariff[\"tec_category\"] = \"other\"\n                    \n                    tariffs.append(tariff)\n        \n        return {\n            \"tariff_lines\": tariffs,\n            \"total_lines\": len(tariffs),\n            \"tariff_system\": \"TEC CEDEAO\"\n        }\n    \n    async def _scrape_via_search_form(self, form) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Utilise le formulaire de recherche pour scraper par chapitre\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[SN] Using search form to scrape\")\n        \n        # Extraire l'URL d'action du formulaire\n        action = form.get('action', '')\n        if not action.startswith('http'):\n            action = self.BASE_URL + action\n        \n        all_tariffs = []\n        \n        # Rechercher chapitre par chapitre\n        for chapter in range(1, 98):\n            chapter_code = f\"{chapter:02d}\"\n            \n            try:\n                # POST la recherche\n                data = {\"sh_code\": chapter_code}\n                \n                async with self.session.post(action, data=data) as response:\n                    html = await response.text()\n                    soup = self.parse_html(html)\n                    \n                    # Parser les résultats\n                    results_table = soup.find('table', {'class': 'results'})\n                    if results_table:\n                        rows = results_table.find_all('tr')[1:]\n                        \n                        for row in rows:\n                            cells = row.find_all('td')\n                            if len(cells) >= 4:\n                                tariff = {\n                                    \"hs_code\": cells[0].text.strip().replace('.', ''),\n                                    \"description\": cells[1].text.strip(),\n                                    \"customs_duty\": self._parse_rate(cells[2].text),\n                                    \"vat\": 0.18,\n                                    \"chapter\": chapter_code\n                                }\n                                all_tariffs.append(tariff)\n                \n                logger.info(f\"[SN] Chapter {chapter_code}: {len(all_tariffs)} total lines\")\n                \n                # Rate limiting\n                await asyncio.sleep(1)\n                \n            except Exception as e:\n                logger.warning(f\"[SN] Error searching chapter {chapter_code}: {str(e)}\")\n                continue\n        \n        return {\n            \"tariff_lines\": all_tariffs,\n            \"total_lines\": len(all_tariffs)\n        }\n    \n    def _get_tec_cedeao_data(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Données TEC CEDEAO de base (fallback)\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[SN] Using TEC CEDEAO reference data\")\n        \n        # Structure de base du TEC CEDEAO\n        tec_categories = {\n            \"Category 0\": {\n                \"rate\": 0.0,\n                \"description\": \"Biens sociaux essentiels, équipements de base, intrants spécifiques\",\n                \"examples\": [\"Médicaments essentiels\", \"Livres\", \"Journaux\"]\n            },\n            \"Category 1\": {\n                \"rate\": 0.05,\n                \"description\": \"Matières premières de base, biens d'équipement, intrants spécifiques\",\n                \"examples\": [\"Minerais\", \"Équipements industriels\"]\n            },\n            \"Category 2\": {\n                \"rate\": 0.10,\n                \"description\": \"Intrants et produits intermédiaires\",\n                \"examples\": [\"Produits semi-finis\"]\n            },\n            \"Category 3\": {\n                \"rate\": 0.20,\n                \"description\": \"Produits finis\",\n                \"examples\": [\"Produits de consommation\"]\n            },\n            \"Category 4\": {\n                \"rate\": 0.35,\n                \"description\": \"Produits spécifiques pour développement filières\",\n                \"examples\": [\"Produits agricoles sensibles\", \"Certains produits alimentaires\"]\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return {\n            \"tec_structure\": tec_categories,\n            \"note\": \"Fallback to TEC CEDEAO reference structure\"\n        }\n    \n    def _parse_rate(self, rate_str: str) -> float:\n        \"\"\"Parse un taux\"\"\"\n        rate_str = str(rate_str).strip().lower()\n        \n        if \"exempt\" in rate_str or \"ex\" == rate_str:\n            return 0.0\n        \n        match = re.search(r'(\\d+\\.?\\d*)', rate_str)\n        if match:\n            rate = float(match.group(1))\n            if rate > 1:\n                rate = rate / 100.0\n            return rate\n        \n        return 0.0\n    \n    async def scrape_regulations(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape les réglementations douanières sénégalaises\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[SN] Starting regulations scrape\")\n        \n        regulations = {\n            \"required_documents\": [\n                \"Facture commerciale\",\n                \"Titre de transport (connaissement/LTA)\",\n                \"Liste de colisage\",\n                \"Certificat d'origine (préférence tarifaire)\",\n                \"Déclaration en douane (DAU CEDEAO)\",\n                \"Certificats sanitaires/phytosanitaires (si applicable)\"\n            ],\n            \"cedeao_benefits\": {\n                \"intra_community_trade\": \"Marchandises originaires CEDEAO exemptées de droits\",\n                \"rules_of_origin\": \"Critère de transformation substantielle ou 30% valeur ajoutée\",\n                \"certificate\": \"Certificat d'origine CEDEAO requis\"\n            },\n            \"prohibited_goods\": [\n                \"Armes sans autorisation\",\n                \"Stupéfiants\",\n                \"Contrefaçons\"\n            ],\n            \"restricted_goods\": [\n                \"Produits pharmaceutiques (autorisation Ministère Santé)\",\n                \"Produits phytosanitaires\",\n                \"Équipements de télécommunication\"\n            ],\n            \"special_regimes\": [\n                \"Zones franches industrielles\",\n                \"Régime de perfectionnement actif\",\n                \"Admission temporaire\",\n                \"Entrepôt douanier\"\n            ]\n        }\n        \n        return regulations\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🇿🇦 **6. SCRAPER AFRIQUE DU SUD (SARS)**\n\nL'Afrique du Sud a le système le plus sophistiqué d'Afrique.\n\n```python\n# backend/crawlers/countries/south_africa_scraper.py\n\"\"\"\nScraper pour South African Revenue Service (SARS)\nSite: https://www.sars.gov.za\nTariff Search: https://tools.sars.gov.za/tariffsearch/\n\"\"\"\nfrom ..base_scraper import BaseCustomsScraper\nfrom typing import Dict, Any, List\nimport re\nimport logging\nimport json\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\nclass SouthAfricaScraper(BaseCustomsScraper):\n    \"\"\"\n    Scraper spécifique pour l'Afrique du Sud\n    \n    SARS dispose d'un excellent outil en ligne de recherche tarifaire\n    SACU Common Tariff (avec Botswana, Eswatini, Lesotho, Namibia)\n    \"\"\"\n    \n    BASE_URL = \"https://www.sars.gov.za\"\n    TARIFF_TOOL_URL = \"https://tools.sars.gov.za/tariffsearch/\"\n    API_URL = \"https://tools.sars.gov.za/tariffsearch/api/tariff\"\n    \n    async def scrape_tariffs(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape les tarifs douaniers sud-africains (SACU)\n        \n        SARS a une API semi-publique accessible via leur outil de recherche\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[ZA] Starting tariff scrape\")\n        \n        try:\n            # L'Afrique du Sud a une API RESTful\n            # On va essayer d'utiliser l'API directement\n            return await self._scrape_via_api()\n        \n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.warning(f\"[ZA] API scrape failed: {str(e)}, falling back to HTML\")\n            return await self._scrape_via_html()\n    \n    async def _scrape_via_api(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Utilise l'API SARS (si accessible)\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[ZA] Attempting API scrape\")\n        \n        all_tariffs = []\n        \n        # L'API SARS accepte des requêtes par code HS\n        # On va faire des requêtes par chapitre\n        for chapter in range(1, 98):\n            chapter_code = f\"{chapter:02d}\"\n            \n            try:\n                # URL API avec chapitre\n                api_url = f\"{self.API_URL}?chapter={chapter_code}\"\n                \n                async with self.session.get(api_url) as response:\n                    if response.status == 200:\n                        data = await response.json()\n                        \n                        if \"items\" in data:\n                            for item in data[\"items\"]:\n                                tariff = {\n                                    \"hs_code\": item.get(\"tariff_heading\", \"\").replace('.', ''),\n                                    \"description\": item.get(\"description\", \"\"),\n                                    \"unit\": item.get(\"unit_of_quantity\", \"\"),\n                                    \"customs_duty_general\": self._parse_duty(item.get(\"general_rate\", \"0\")),\n                                    \"customs_duty_eu\": self._parse_duty(item.get(\"eu_rate\", \"0\")),\n                                    \"customs_duty_efta\": self._parse_duty(item.get(\"efta_rate\", \"0\")),\n                                    \"customs_duty_uk\": self._parse_duty(item.get(\"uk_rate\", \"0\")),\n                                    \"vat\": 0.15,  # VAT standard ZA\n                                    \"excise\": item.get(\"excise_rate\", 0.0),\n                                    \"source\": \"SARS South Africa (SACU)\"\n                                }\n                                all_tariffs.append(tariff)\n                \n                logger.info(f\"[ZA] Chapter {chapter_code}: {len(all_tariffs)} total lines\")\n                \n                # Rate limiting\n                await asyncio.sleep(0.5)\n                \n            except Exception as e:\n                logger.warning(f\"[ZA] Error fetching chapter {chapter_code} from API: {str(e)}\")\n                continue\n        \n        return {\n            \"tariff_lines\": all_tariffs,\n            \"total_lines\": len(all_tariffs),\n            \"tariff_system\": \"SACU Common Tariff\"\n        }\n    \n    async def _scrape_via_html(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Fallback: scrape l'outil HTML de recherche tarifaire\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[ZA] Scraping via HTML tool\")\n        \n        html = await self.fetch_page(self.TARIFF_TOOL_URL)\n        soup = self.parse_html(html)\n        \n        tariffs = []\n        \n        # Le site SARS a une interface de recherche interactive\n        # On va chercher les données JavaScript embarquées\n        scripts = soup.find_all('script')\n        \n        for script in scripts:\n            if script.string and 'tariffData' in script.string:\n                # Extraire les données JSON du JavaScript\n                match = re.search(r'var tariffData = (\\[.*?\\]);', script.string, re.DOTALL)\n                if match:\n                    try:\n                        tariff_data = json.loads(match.group(1))\n                        \n                        for item in tariff_data:\n                            tariff = {\n                                \"hs_code\": item.get(\"code\", \"\").replace('.', ''),\n                                \"description\": item.get(\"desc\", \"\"),\n                                \"customs_duty_general\": self._parse_rate(item.get(\"gen\", \"0\")),\n                                \"vat\": 0.15,\n                                \"source\": \"SARS ZA\"\n                            }\n                            tariffs.append(tariff)\n                        \n                        logger.info(f\"[ZA] Extracted {len(tariffs)} lines from embedded data\")\n                        break\n                        \n                    except json.JSONDecodeError as e:\n                        logger.error(f\"[ZA] Error parsing embedded JSON: {str(e)}\")\n                        continue\n        \n        if not tariffs:\n            logger.warning(\"[ZA] No data found in HTML, using SACU reference\")\n            return self._get_sacu_reference_data()\n        \n        return {\n            \"tariff_lines\": tariffs,\n            \"total_lines\": len(tariffs)\n        }\n    \n    def _parse_duty(self, duty_str: str) -> float:\n        \"\"\"\n        Parse un taux de douane SARS\n        \n        Formats possibles:\n        - \"15%\" -> 0.15\n        - \"Free\" -> 0.0\n        - \"R 2.50/kg\" -> format spécifique\n        \"\"\"\n        duty_str = str(duty_str).strip().lower()\n        \n        if \"free\" in duty_str or duty_str == \"0\":\n            return 0.0\n        \n        # Si c'est un taux ad valorem simple\n        match = re.search(r'(\\d+\\.?\\d*)%', duty_str)\n        if match:\n            return float(match.group(1)) / 100.0\n        \n        # Si c'est un taux spécifique (R x/kg)\n        if 'r ' in duty_str or 'zar' in duty_str:\n            # Marquer comme taux spécifique\n            return {\"type\": \"specific\", \"value\": duty_str}\n        \n        return 0.0\n    \n    def _parse_rate(self, rate_str: str) -> float:\n        \"\"\"Parse un taux simple\"\"\"\n        rate_str = str(rate_str).strip()\n        \n        if \"free\" in rate_str.lower():\n            return 0.0\n        \n        match = re.search(r'(\\d+\\.?\\d*)', rate_str)\n        if match:\n            rate = float(match.group(1))\n            if rate > 1:\n                rate = rate / 100.0\n            return rate\n        \n        return 0.0\n    \n    def _get_sacu_reference_data(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Données de référence SACU\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[ZA] Using SACU reference data\")\n        \n        return {\n            \"sacu_info\": {\n                \"members\": [\"South Africa\", \"Botswana\", \"Eswatini\", \"Lesotho\", \"Namibia\"],\n                \"common_tariff\": \"SACU Common Tariff applies to all members\",\n                \"revenue_sharing\": \"Revenue pool shared based on formula\"\n            },\n            \"note\": \"Fallback to SACU reference structure\"\n        }\n    \n    async def scrape_regulations(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Scrape les réglementations douanières sud-africaines\n        \"\"\"\n        logger.info(\"[ZA] Starting regulations scrape\")\n        \n        regulations = {\n            \"required_documents\": [\n                \"Commercial Invoice\",\n                \"Bill of Entry (customs declaration)\",\n                \"Bill of Lading / Airway Bill\",\n                \"Packing List\",\n                \"Certificate of Origin (for preferential tariffs)\",\n                \"Import Permit (for controlled goods)\",\n                \"ITrac Number (for imports > R20,000)\"\n            ],\n            \"preferential_agreements\": [\n                \"SADC Trade Protocol\",\n                \"EU-SADC EPA\",\n                \"EFTA Free Trade Agreement\",\n                \"UK-SACU EPA\",\n                \"AfCFTA\"\n            ],\n            \"prohibited_goods\": [\n                \"Narcotics\",\n                \"Counterfeit goods\",\n                \"Certain used vehicles\",\n                \"Hazardous waste\",\n                \"Endangered species (CITES)\"\n            ],\n            \"restricted_goods\": [\n                \"Firearms and ammunition\",\n                \"Pharmaceuticals\",\n                \"Telecommunications equipment\",\n                \"Agricultural products (phytosanitary)\",\n                \"Diamonds (Kimberley Process)\"\n            ],\n            \"customs_procedures\": {\n                \"normal_declaration\": \"Bill of Entry submitted via SARS eFiling\",\n                \"sad500\": \"Single Administrative Document for SACU\",\n                \"provisional_payments\": \"Required for certain goods\",\n                \"post_clearance_audit\": \"SARS may audit within 5 years\"\n            },\n            \"special_regimes\": [\n                \"SEZ (Special Economic Zones)\",\n                \"IDZ (Industrial Development Zones)\",\n                \"Duty Rebate (refund of duties on inputs for export production)\",\n                \"Duty Drawback (refund after export)\",\n                \"Temporary Imports (ATA Carnet)\"\n            ]\n        }\n        \n        return regulations\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🏗️ **FACTORY PATTERN POUR UTILISER LES SCRAPERS**\n\n```python\n# backend/crawlers/scraper_factory.py\n\"\"\"\nFactory pour créer le bon scraper selon le pays\n\"\"\"\nfrom typing import Dict, Any\nfrom .countries.morocco_scraper import MoroccoScraper\nfrom .countries.kenya_scraper import KenyaScraper\nfrom .countries.algeria_scraper import AlgeriaScraper\nfrom .countries.senegal_scraper import SenegalScraper\nfrom .countries.south_africa_scraper import SouthAfricaScraper\nfrom .base_scraper import BaseCustomsScraper\n\n# Configuration des pays\nSCRAPER_REGISTRY = {\n    \"MA\": {\n        \"class\": MoroccoScraper,\n        \"config\": {\n            \"name\": \"Maroc - ADII\",\n            \"language\": \"fr\",\n            \"website\": \"https://www.douane.gov.ma\"\n        }\n    },\n    \"KE\": {\n        \"class\": KenyaScraper,\n        \"config\": {\n            \"name\": \"Kenya - KRA\",\n            \"language\": \"en\",\n            \"website\": \"https://www.kra.go.ke\"\n        }\n    },\n    \"DZ\": {\n        \"class\": AlgeriaScraper,\n        \"config\": {\n            \"name\": \"Algérie - DGD\",\n            \"language\": \"fr\",\n            \"website\": \"https://www.douane.gov.dz\"\n        }\n    },\n    \"SN\": {\n        \"class\": SenegalScraper,\n        \"config\": {\n            \"name\": \"Sénégal - DGD\",\n            \"language\": \"fr\",\n            \"website\": \"https://www.douanes.sn\"\n        }\n    },\n    \"ZA\": {\n        \"class\": SouthAfricaScraper,\n        \"config\": {\n            \"name\": \"South Africa - SARS\",\n            \"language\": \"en\",\n            \"website\": \"https://www.sars.gov.za\"\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nclass ScraperFactory:\n    \"\"\"Factory pour créer les scrapers\"\"\"\n    \n    @staticmethod\n    def create_scraper(country_code: str) -> BaseCustomsScraper:\n        \"\"\"\n        Crée une instance de scraper pour un pays\n        \n        Args:\n            country_code: Code ISO 2 lettres du pays (MA, KE, DZ, SN, ZA)\n        \n        Returns:\n            Instance du scraper approprié\n        \n        Raises:\n            ValueError: Si le pays n'est pas supporté\n        \"\"\"\n        if country_code not in SCRAPER_REGISTRY:\n            raise ValueError(\n                f\"No scraper available for country '{country_code}'. \"\n                f\"Supported countries: {', '.join(SCRAPER_REGISTRY.keys())}\"\n            )\n        \n        scraper_info = SCRAPER_REGISTRY[country_code]\n        scraper_class = scraper_info[\"class\"]\n        config = scraper_info[\"config\"]\n        \n        return scraper_class(country_code, config)\n    \n    @staticmethod\n    def get_supported_countries() -> Dict[str, str]:\n        \"\"\"Retourne la liste des pays supportés\"\"\"\n        return {\n            code: info[\"config\"][\"name\"]\n            for code, info in SCRAPER_REGISTRY.items()\n        }\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🧪 **EXEMPLE D'UTILISATION**\n\n```python\n# backend/jobs/tasks.py\n\"\"\"\nTâches asynchrones pour crawler les données douanières\n\"\"\"\nimport asyncio\nfrom backend.crawlers.scraper_factory import ScraperFactory\nfrom backend.db.mongo import db\nfrom datetime import datetime\nimport logging\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\nasync def crawl_country_customs_data(country_code: str, job_id: str = None):\n    \"\"\"\n    Crawl les données douanières d'un pays\n    \n    Args:\n        country_code: Code ISO du pays (MA, KE, DZ, SN, ZA)\n        job_id: ID du job (optionnel)\n    \"\"\"\n    logger.info(f\"Starting crawl for {country_code}\")\n    \n    try:\n        # Créer le scraper approprié\n        async with ScraperFactory.create_scraper(country_code) as scraper:\n            # Scraper toutes les données\n            data = await scraper.scrape_all()\n            \n            # Sauvegarder dans MongoDB\n            collection = db[\"customs_data\"]\n            \n            # Ajouter métadonnées\n            data[\"_id\"] = f\"{country_code}_{datetime.utcnow().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}\"\n            data[\"job_id\"] = job_id\n            data[\"imported_at\"] = datetime.utcnow()\n            \n            # Insérer\n            result = collection.insert_one(data)\n            \n            logger.info(f\"Successfully crawled {country_code}: {data['tariffs']['total_lines']} tariff lines\")\n            \n            return {\n                \"success\": True,\n                \"country\": country_code,\n                \"tariff_lines\": data[\"tariffs\"][\"total_lines\"],\n                \"document_id\": str(result.inserted_id)\n            }\n            \n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.error(f\"Error crawling {country_code}: {str(e)}\")\n        return {\n            \"success\": False,\n            \"country\": country_code,\n            \"error\": str(e)\n        }\n\n\nasync def crawl_all_pilot_countries():\n    \"\"\"Crawl tous les 5 pays pilotes\"\"\"\n    countries = [\"MA\", \"KE\", \"DZ\", \"SN\", \"ZA\"]\n    \n    results = []\n    \n    for country in countries:\n        result = await crawl_country_customs_data(country)\n        results.append(result)\n        \n        # Pause entre pays\n        await asyncio.sleep(5)\n    \n    return results\n\n\n# Utilisation standalone\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    asyncio.run(crawl_all_pilot_countries())\n```\n\n---\n\n## 📊 **PROCHAINES ÉTAPES**\n\nMaintenant que vous avez les ?\n3. **Les API endpoints** pour déclencher les crawls manuellement ?\n4. **Le dashboard de monitoring** des jobs de scraping ?\n5. **Les tests unitaires** pour chaque scraper ?\n\nDites-moi ce qui
